title: Nightly Librarian - 2026-05-20
summary: Agent infrastructure moved from experiments toward deployment paths builders can actually test.

items.title: Cloudflare adds Claude Managed Agents support
source_facts: Cloudflare says Claude Managed Agents can run tool calls inside isolated Firecracker microVMs near private backends.
items.builder_takeaway: Builders can test agent execution closer to production infrastructure without managing the full agent runtime themselves.

items.title: Forge publishes local-agent guardrails
source_facts: Forge ships an evaluation harness for local LLM tool-calling reliability.
items.builder_takeaway: Local-agent builders get a concrete benchmark target before trusting an 8B model with multi-step tool use.

items.title: Vercel tests flat-rate CDN pricing
source_facts: Vercel opened a limited beta for flat-rate CDN pricing on Pro teams.
items.builder_takeaway: Cost-sensitive operators should watch whether this removes spike-bill risk before moving high-traffic archives.
